home.title: Home
home.description: Fleet and car rental operations for taxi and logistics.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Sign in to Autiqa fleet CRM.

verifyEmail.title: Verify email
verifyEmail.description: Enter the code we emailed you to activate your account.

onboardingOrg.title: Let's Get You Set Up
onboardingOrg.description: Tell us about your business so we can tailor Autiqa to your needs.

login.asideHeadline: Command every vehicle. Calm every shift.
login.asideLede: One place to see trips, utilization, and risk — built for taxi and rental fleets that cannot afford blind spots.

pluses.liveMap: Unified live map and status for every car you run — taxis, rentals, or mixed.
pluses.kpis: Operational KPIs that update as your fleet moves, not when someone exports a sheet.
pluses.roles: Role-based access so dispatch, finance, and partners see exactly what they need.
pluses.margins: Designed for high churn and thin margins: fewer tools, fewer context switches.

login.formSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access the control center.

errors.generic: Could not sign you in. Please try again.

register.formSubtitle: Fill in the form to get started with Autiqa.

errors.passwordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.conflict: An account with this email already exists.
errors.badRequest: Registration could not be completed. Check your details and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Operational overview
dashboard.lead: High-level fleet health, utilization, and risk — tuned for taxi and rental operations that need signal without noise.

fleet.title: Fleet
fleet.lead: Vehicles, assignments, and status in one place. Detailed VIN and plate views will connect here.
fleet.emptyBody: Everything you need to manage and grow your fleet, all in one place.
fleet.addVehicleValidationModelsRequired: Enter a model for each vehicle.
fleet.addVehicleError: Could not save this vehicle. Check the fields and try again.
fleet.vehicleDetailsLead: Detailed fleet card view is coming soon.

vehicleDetails.emptyFeesCopy: This vehicle has no ticket records yet.
vehicleDetails.emptyComplianceCopy: Add policy or inspection dates to track deadlines.
vehicleDetails.emptyMaintenanceCopy: Service events will appear here after first maintenance.

expenseDialog.title: Create expense
expenseDialog.lead: Log a new cost event for this vehicle and optionally link a driver.
expenseDialog.notesPlaceholder: Add optional details about this expense
expenseDialog.validation: Fill in required fields: title, amount, and date.
expenseDialog.error: Could not create expense. Check fields and try again.

map.title: Live map
map.lead: Real-time positions and trip context for every active asset.

finance.title: Finance
finance.lead: Revenue, costs, and margin intelligence across vehicles and categories.

drivers.title: Drivers
drivers.lead: Contracts, performance, and compliance for everyone behind the wheel.
drivers.searchPlaceholder: Search by first or last name...
drivers.emptyBody: Add your first driver profile to manage assignments, compliance, and performance in one place.
drivers.driverNotFoundBody: This driver does not exist or is not available in the current list.

dialog.title: Deploy Driver Fleet
dialog.lead: Add multiple drivers to the operational roster.
dialog.validation: Please provide first and last name for each driver. Email and phone must be valid if filled.
dialog.error: Could not save drivers. Check the fields and try again.

documents.title: Documents
documents.dropzoneHint: Drag and drop files here, or

validation.selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one file.
validation.maxSize: Each file must be 5MB or smaller.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.lead: Work orders, downtime, and spend — keep the fleet road-ready.

settings.title: Settings
settings.lead: Workspace preferences, integrations, and access controls.

appShell.title: Autiqa app
appShell.lead: The main product UI (fleet, vehicles, reports) will live here.

onboardingOrg.title: Let's Get You Set Up
onboardingOrg.lede: Tell us a bit about your business so we can tailor the experience to your needs.

errors.generic: Could not create your organization. Please try again.

verifyEmail.title: Enter your code
verifyEmail.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}. Paste or type it below to unlock Autiqa.
verifyEmail.footerHint: Check spam or promotions — sometimes the message lands there.

errors.invalidCode: That code is invalid or expired. Check the message and try again.
errors.generic: We could not verify your email. Please try again.
